sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96337" key="staxuhkome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στᾰχῠη-κομέω</orth>, <sense id="n96337.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be decked with ears of corn</tr_>, of fields, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:150" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.150</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
